SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config

Record Class OptimizerOptions

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions
Record Components:
enableDistinctAggregationSoftLimit - Whether to enable the distinct aggregation soft limit optimization
enableRoundRobinRepartition - Whether to use round-robin repartitioning (default true)
enableTopkAggregation - Whether to enable top-K aggregation optimization (default true)
enableWindowLimits - Whether to enable window function limit optimizations
enableTopkDynamicFilterPushdown - Whether to enable top-K dynamic filter pushdown
enableJoinDynamicFilterPushdown - Whether to enable join dynamic filter pushdown
enableAggregateDynamicFilterPushdown - Whether to enable aggregate dynamic filter pushdown
enableDynamicFilterPushdown - Whether to enable dynamic filter pushdown
filterNullJoinKeys - Whether to filter null join keys during planning (default true)
repartitionAggregations - Whether to repartition aggregation inputs (default true)
repartitionFileMinSize - Minimum file size (in bytes) for file repartitioning
repartitionJoins - Whether to repartition join inputs (default true)
allowSymmetricJoinsWithoutPruning - Whether to allow symmetric joins without pruning
repartitionFileScans - Whether to repartition file scans (default true)
preserveFilePartitions - Number of file partitions to preserve
repartitionWindows - Whether to repartition window function inputs (default true)
repartitionSorts - Whether to repartition sort inputs (default true)
subsetRepartitionThreshold - Subset repartition threshold
preferExistingSort - Whether to prefer existing sort order
skipFailedRules - Whether to skip failed optimizer rules instead of erroring (default true)
maxPasses - Maximum number of optimizer passes (default 3)
topDownJoinKeyReordering - Whether to use top-down join key reordering (default true)
preferHashJoin - Whether to prefer hash joins over sort-merge joins (default true)
enablePiecewiseMergeJoin - Whether to enable piecewise merge join
hashJoinSinglePartitionThreshold - Threshold (in bytes) for using a single partition in hash joins
hashJoinSinglePartitionThresholdRows - Threshold (in rows) for using a single partition in hash joins
hashJoinInlistPushdownMaxSize - Maximum in-list size for hash join pushdown (in bytes)
hashJoinInlistPushdownMaxDistinctValues - Maximum distinct values for hash join in-list pushdown
defaultFilterSelectivity - Default filter selectivity percentage (0-100, default 20)
preferExistingUnion - Whether to prefer existing union ordering
expandViewsAtOutput - Whether to expand views at the output level
enableSortPushdown - Whether to enable sort pushdown optimization
enableLeafExpressionPushdown - Whether to extract leaf expressions (e.g. get_field) into projections closer to leaf table scans and push them down toward the leaves
public record OptimizerOptions(Boolean enableDistinctAggregationSoftLimit, Boolean enableRoundRobinRepartition, Boolean enableTopkAggregation, Boolean enableWindowLimits, Boolean enableTopkDynamicFilterPushdown, Boolean enableJoinDynamicFilterPushdown, Boolean enableAggregateDynamicFilterPushdown, Boolean enableDynamicFilterPushdown, Boolean filterNullJoinKeys, Boolean repartitionAggregations, Long repartitionFileMinSize, Boolean repartitionJoins, Boolean allowSymmetricJoinsWithoutPruning, Boolean repartitionFileScans, Integer preserveFilePartitions, Boolean repartitionWindows, Boolean repartitionSorts, Integer subsetRepartitionThreshold, Boolean preferExistingSort, Boolean skipFailedRules, Integer maxPasses, Boolean topDownJoinKeyReordering, Boolean preferHashJoin, Boolean enablePiecewiseMergeJoin, Long hashJoinSinglePartitionThreshold, Long hashJoinSinglePartitionThresholdRows, Long hashJoinInlistPushdownMaxSize, Integer hashJoinInlistPushdownMaxDistinctValues, Integer defaultFilterSelectivity, Boolean preferExistingUnion, Boolean expandViewsAtOutput, Boolean enableSortPushdown, Boolean enableLeafExpressionPushdown) extends Record
Optimizer configuration options. Maps to DataFusion's OptimizerOptions.

All fields are nullable. A null value means the DataFusion default is used.

Example: 

OptimizerOptions optimizer = OptimizerOptions.builder()
    .preferHashJoin(true)
    .maxPasses(5)
    .repartitionJoins(true)
    .build();
ConfigOptions config = ConfigOptions.builder()
    .optimizer(optimizer)
    .build();
See Also:
  • Rust DataFusion: OptimizerOptions

    • OptimizerOptions

      public OptimizerOptions(Boolean enableDistinctAggregationSoftLimit, Boolean enableRoundRobinRepartition, Boolean enableTopkAggregation, Boolean enableWindowLimits, Boolean enableTopkDynamicFilterPushdown, Boolean enableJoinDynamicFilterPushdown, Boolean enableAggregateDynamicFilterPushdown, Boolean enableDynamicFilterPushdown, Boolean filterNullJoinKeys, Boolean repartitionAggregations, Long repartitionFileMinSize, Boolean repartitionJoins, Boolean allowSymmetricJoinsWithoutPruning, Boolean repartitionFileScans, Integer preserveFilePartitions, Boolean repartitionWindows, Boolean repartitionSorts, Integer subsetRepartitionThreshold, Boolean preferExistingSort, Boolean skipFailedRules, Integer maxPasses, Boolean topDownJoinKeyReordering, Boolean preferHashJoin, Boolean enablePiecewiseMergeJoin, Long hashJoinSinglePartitionThreshold, Long hashJoinSinglePartitionThresholdRows, Long hashJoinInlistPushdownMaxSize, Integer hashJoinInlistPushdownMaxDistinctValues, Integer defaultFilterSelectivity, Boolean preferExistingUnion, Boolean expandViewsAtOutput, Boolean enableSortPushdown, Boolean enableLeafExpressionPushdown)

  • Method Details

    • builder

      public static OptimizerOptions.Builder builder()
      Returns a new builder.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
